meaning: v.沉思n.[希神] 缪斯女神
examples: I want to be a better writer and maybe my muse will provide the motivation.
So how do you train your Muse?
The Muse had cast her spell!
"The Muse"'s one-joke monotony is relieved on occasion, usually by unexpected cameos from Brooks' film-world cronies.
Engineer Claudius Mittendorfer, who worked on projects by Arctic Monkeys, Muse and others, pitched in.
